tags.name: uui-breadcrumb-item
tags.description: A breadcrumb-item to be used with the breadcrumbs component.

attributes.name: last-item
attributes.description: Specifies if the element is the last item in the uui-breadcrumbs. Last item will not render as a link

properties.name: lastItem
properties.description: Specifies if the element is the last item in the uui-breadcrumbs. Last item will not render as a link

slots.description: This slot displays elements inside the breadcrumb

cssParts.name: separator
cssParts.description: change the content of the after element of this part to change the separator

tags.name: uui-breadcrumbs
tags.description: A breadcrumbs component to be used in combination with the uui-breadcrumb-item.

slots.description: Slot to display nested breadcrumb items. It supports `<uui-breadcrumb-item>` elements or elements containing the `role="listitem"` attribute
